originalTitle: Fixing Reinforcement Learning with PufferLib - Live Dev
title: Debugging PufferLib Baseline Sweeps and Reviewing New Environment Contributions
summary: Worked on finalizing Pong and Connect Four baselines, diagnosing performance regressions in vectorized environments due to a missing `num_workers` parameter. Also reviewed a contributor's new environment prototype, providing guidance on using the native C environment API and Cython bindings.
